headline: Dayak Chamber Reports RM4.5 Billion in Business Revenue
context: Dayak Chamber of Commerce reported 2,800 member businesses generated combined revenue of RM4.5 billion in 2025.

cards.big: 2,800 Dayak businesses generated RM4.5 billion revenue in 2025
cards.sub: Indigenous business community growing 12% annually but capital access limited

cards.big: Only 8% of Dayak-owned businesses secured bank loans above RM500,000 in 2025
cards.sub: Collateral requirements exclude businesses operating on NCR land titles

cards.big: Government procurement allocated only 4% of Sarawak contracts to Dayak firms
cards.sub: Malay-owned firms received 28% despite being minority in state population

cards.big: DCCI launched RM50 million venture fund for Dayak startups January 2026
cards.sub: Fund targets technology agriculture processing and tourism across 5 divisions

cards.big: Dayak business growth tests whether indigenous entrepreneurs get equal access to capital
RM4.5 billion Dayak business revenue proves indigenous enterprise thrives with institutional support structures.
